# eraseColor()

**Instance Method**

Retrieves the current color used to erase the view.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func eraseColor() -> NSColor!
```

## Return Value

The color object previously set using the [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/QCView/setEraseColor(_:)] method.

## Managing the Erase Color

- **erase()**: Clears the view using the current erase color.
- **setEraseColor(_:)**: Sets the color used to erase the view.
